results.text: Carson Carels - Wikipedia. Carson Carels (born June 23, 2008) is a Canadian ice hockey player who is a defenceman for the North Dakota Fighting Hawks of the NCAA. He is considered a top prospect eligible for the 2026 NHL entry draft. Carson Carels joins Univ. of North Dakota - Elite Prospects. Carson Carels joins Univ. of North Dakota from Prince George Cougars in a confirmed transaction on 2026-05-18. View stats and history on Elite Prospects.
